customGroups.name: vSAN Datastores
customGroups.description: List of vSphere datastores that are backed by vSAN. Use this group to see all the vSAN datastores, filtering out the non vSAN datastores.

customGroups.name: VMware Private Cloud
customGroups.description: vSphere Data Centers that are not part of any of VMware-based public clouds (e.g. VMware on Amazon, Azure VMware Solution)

customGroups.name: All Distributed Switches and Port Groups
Operating System World
customGroups.description: The top level group for VMware Aria Operations Application Management Pack. This is a built-in group, hence it is not customizable. It provides the starting line for overall navigation. Use this to see all the objects under the solution.

customGroups.name: XR SI N2 Clusters
customGroups.description: XR Clusters that are using N-2

customGroups.name: Non vSAN Datastores
customGroups.description: List of vSphere datastores that are not backed by vSAN. This can be VMFS or NFS. It includes both local and shared datastores. Use this group to see all the non vSAN datastores, filtering out the vSAN datastores.

customGroups.name: All SQL Clusters, Hosts, and VMs
HCA Divisions - ALL
customGroups.description: 5/13/26 - Creating to test dashboard widget (Tom Gorman)
